title: neotinea ustulata var. aestivalis
intro: Neotinea ustulata var. aestivalis, a variety of the orchid species Neotinea ustulata, is a rare and little-studied plant native to Europe. It is often used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Neotinea ustulata var. aestivalis include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Neotinea ustulata var. aestivalis is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
